subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! The letter from his honor was received. From one aspect it brought exceeding sorrow and lamentation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه آنحضرت وصول یافت از جهتی مورث احزان شدید گردید و آن فریاد
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @law of Huququ'llah, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @martyrs and martyrdom
